sections.subtitle: Recent Form
sections.text: FC Bayern München are in excellent form, remaining unbeaten in their last 6 matches with strong attacking output (95 goals scored this season). TSG Hoffenheim, however, are struggling, winless in their last 4 matches and conceding frequently (64 goals conceded, 16th in the league).

sections.subtitle: Head-to-Head Record
sections.text: Bayern have dominated recent encounters, winning 3 of the last 5 matchups, including a 5-0 thrashing in their most recent meeting. Hoffenheim managed a 4-2 win in their last home game against Bayern, showing potential for an upset.

sections.subtitle: Key Players and Stats
sections.text: Bayern’s Harry Kane (25 goals) and Michael Olise (14 assists) are in top form, while Hoffenheim’s Andrej Kramarić (3 goals, 3 assists in last 5) poses a threat. Bayern’s superior possession (often over 60%) and shot volume contrast with Hoffenheim’s defensive frailty.

sections.subtitle: Season Statistics
sections.text: Bayern lead the league with 79 points and a +63 goal difference, showcasing their dominance. Hoffenheim sit 15th with a -18 goal difference, struggling defensively but capable of creating chances (3rd in penalty area entries per game).

sections.subtitle: Match Dynamics
sections.text: Expect Bayern to control possession and create numerous chances, while Hoffenheim may rely on counterattacks. Historical head-to-head trends suggest high-scoring games and over 10.5 corners, with Bayern often scoring first.
